---
title: "This is a test"
description: "First blog test"
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://samanthacsik.github.io/
    # orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: PhD candidate at ENS Ulm and Sanofi
    affiliation-url: https://ucsb-meds.github.io/ 
date: 02-14-2023
categories: [Python] # self-defined categories
citation: 
  url: https://samanthacsik.github.io/posts/2022-10-24-quarto-blogs/ 
image: 500x500.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
